Body.Content:
Policy updates in Microsoft Purview now sync faster, reducing wait times from up to 2 hours to just 30 minutes, so your protections stay up to date and take effect more quickly across your organization.

GA date: June CY2026

GA date: June CY2026

Details.Name: Summary
Details.Value: Policy updates in Microsoft Purview now sync faster, reducing wait times from up to 2 hours to just 30 minutes, so your protections stay up to date and take effect more quickly across your organization.

message.Title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention - Reduce policy sync status SLA on the Purview UI from 2 hours to 30 mins
